Vishal Kumar, I created the two PRs for review.

1. Infra PR

   <infra PR link>

This includes the fix for the Function App deployment issue we encountered in Test. The deployment was timing out at the SCM/Kudu endpoint, so I added the Function App sites private endpoint pattern based on the SQYC reference, including the required DNS handling. I also included the runtime blob app settings cleanup needed by the Function App.

2. Function App PR

   <function app PR link>

This includes the Function App deployment pipeline staging fix. The pipeline now follows the staged flow and supports the dependency sequence properly so deployment can proceed Dev to Test to UAT.

I already validated both branches up to Dev and Test, and both are now working. Once these are approved and merged, I’ll rerun from DEDIAAutomationDevelop and validate up to UAT.
